title: Prawn Broil Medley
description: A savory and crispy Mediterranean medley featuring tiger prawns for a meal-prep-friendly dish.

ingredients.name: Pitted Kalamata olives, sliced in half
Artichoke hearts, halved and lightly fried (optional)

instructions: Preheat your broiler to high heat.
Place prawns in a single layer on a baking sheet. Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with lemon juice, garlic, salt, pepper, parsley, red pepper flakes, if using.
Add olives and dill between layers of prawns for added flavor. If using, place artichokes on top or around the prawns. Sprinkle feta cheese evenly over the top.
Broil for about 5-7 minutes, or until the prawns are cooked through and golden brown, checking every minute to avoid burning.
Serve immediately with lemon wedges and additional fresh herbs like mint or cilantro on the side.
